mcpRegistry.name: GitHub
mcpRegistry.description: Allows AI agents to search, view, create, and manage GitHub repositories, issues, pulls, and commits.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

mcpRegistry.name: PostgreSQL
mcpRegistry.description: Enables agents to inspect schemas, execute read-only queries, and analyze PostgreSQL database tables safely.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

mcpRegistry.name: Kite Connect
mcpRegistry.description: MCP server integration for Zerodha Kite Connect APIs, allowing agents to fetch holdings, margins, positions, and live quotes.
mcpRegistry.author: Kite Trade

mcpRegistry.name: Brave Search
mcpRegistry.description: Integrate Brave Search to allow agents to search the web, fetch search results, and crawl web pages.
mcpRegistry.author: Brave Software

mcpRegistry.name: Fetch Web Reader
mcpRegistry.description: Exposes tools to download and convert remote HTML pages into clean, agent-readable markdown.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

mcpRegistry.name: Slack Integration
mcpRegistry.description: Allows agents to list channels, read conversations, read threads, and post messages to Slack workspaces.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

mcpRegistry.name: Local Filesystem
mcpRegistry.description: Enables secure and sandboxed local directory read, write, search, and file information operations.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

mcpRegistry.name: Memory Graph
mcpRegistry.description: Persistent semantic knowledge graph storage using simple files to give agents long-term episodic memory.
mcpRegistry.author: Anthropic

learningResources.title: Advanced Agent Orchestration Masterclass

learningResources.description: A fast-paced YouTube guide on setting up custom servers in your local IDE config files to read folders.
